nasb.text: and you shall offer as the drink offering one-half a hin of wine as an offering by fire, as a soothing aroma to the Lord.

esv.text: And you shall offer for the drink offering half a hin of wine, as a food offering, a pleasing aroma to the Lord.

cnv.text: 也要用兩公升酒作奠祭，獻給耶和華為馨香的火祭。

ccb.text: 还要献上两升酒作奠祭。这是蒙耶和华悦纳的馨香之祭。
